task_0.key_decision: Baseline 281/283 pass with 2 known failures; acceptable for v2
task_0.for_next_tasks: Baseline data lives in plan's 'Phase 0 baseline notes' section; SHA 6e475198 is the pre-Phase-0 anchor

task_1.key_decision: Inventory captured; CompactHandoffRendererTest.kt has only 1 test (renderEmitsTopLevelRuleAndScreenHeader) with 2 assertions, neither references v1 literals
task_1.for_next_tasks: Task 1.7 is effectively a no-op for pre-existing tests; only updates assertions added by Tasks 1.2-1.6. Kotlin renderer functions: render (4-68), appendCompactItem (70-78), compactTargetSummary (80-96), compactSourceLine (98-107), reasonTokenFor (109-124). JS prompt.js: compactReasonTokens (148-159) wraps FIXTHIS_REASON_TOKEN_MAP (132-146); v2 should reuse it.

task_2.key_decision: v1 budget test is RELATIVE only (compact < precise), no absolute char budget exists
task_2.for_next_tasks: Task 6.3 budget guard formula: v2_budget_chars = ceil(1.5 × v1_baseline_chars). Existing parity fixture expected-prompt.txt = 334 chars; v2 budget for that fixture = 501. Real budget for session-v2.json (4 items) measured in Task 6.3. Existing v1 relative guard at FeedbackQueueFormatterTest.kt:585-593, function compactPromptIsShorterThanPreciseForRepresentativeSession.

task_3.key_decision: Confirmed: matcher fix in Phase 0.6 is needed (31/31 candidates have null scoreMargin across 3 real sessions, 8 items have ≥2 candidates)
task_3.for_next_tasks: Session JSON uses 'items' key (NOT 'annotations'). Sample data: a8483865 has 16 cands/4 multi; 050f4301 has 4 cands/1 multi; 0c304fd6 has 11 cands/3 multi. Task 5 (0.6 matcher fix) will populate scoreMargin on rank-1 when ≥2 candidates exist.

task_4.key_decision: Confirmed: app.js is auto-generated by concatenation; build command is `node scripts/build-console-assets.mjs` (NO npm alias)
task_4.for_next_tasks: Task 5.8 (regenerate app.js) MUST run `node scripts/build-console-assets.mjs` from the worktree root. Source files concatenated in order: state.js, app.js parts, ..., prompt.js, ..., main.js (11 files total). Output: fixthis-mcp/src/main/resources/console/app.js. Plan's task 5.8 still has stale 'likely npm run build:console OR node build-console-assets.mjs' placeholder — Task 5.8 implementer should also fix that placeholder when running the build.

exposed_apis: SourceCandidate.scoreMargin (semantic CHANGED: now raw score difference normalizedScores[0]-normalizedScores[1] for rank-1 only when ≥2 candidates; null otherwise)
task_5.key_decision: Matcher now populates SourceCandidate.scoreMargin with raw score difference (was MarginContext ratio). MarginContext.scoreMargin (internal ratio) preserved for confidence calc.
task_5.for_next_tasks: Renderers (Phases 1-5) can rely on rank-1 SourceCandidate.scoreMargin being populated when ≥2 candidates exist. The fallback in spec ('prefer wire scoreMargin, else compute from rank-1 - rank-2 score') is now a no-op for matcher-produced data; fallback still useful for wire data from older sessions where scoreMargin might not be populated. New matcher tests at SourceMatcherTest.kt: scoreMarginIsPopulatedOnRankOneWhenRunnerUpExists, scoreMarginIsNullWhenOnlyOneCandidate, matchReturnsEmptyListWhenNoCandidates. Two existing tests (lines ~213 and ~529) updated to expect null in single-candidate scenarios.

task_6.key_decision: v2 placeholder seeded under ## Unreleased / ### Changed
task_6.for_next_tasks: Task 7.3 will replace this placeholder with final user-facing one-paragraph summary; do NOT add a duplicate entry.

exposed_apis: FixThisRect.formatBox(): String — returns '(L,T)-(R,B) [W×H]' with × U+00D7; W/H clamped to ≥0
task_7.key_decision: formatBox added as new internal extension; formatBounds preserved unchanged for PRECISE/FULL formatters
task_7.for_next_tasks: Task 1.5 (compactUiLine) calls formatBox() to render the box= portion. JS prompt.js (Task 5.2) must produce byte-identical [W×H] suffix and integer-only width/height computation. The (L,T,R,B) part inside parens has known divergence (Kotlin .0 vs JS bare int) — parity test ignores LTRB but enforces [W×H].

exposed_apis: render() now emits 'viewport: WxH' line after screenshot: when both dims non-null
task_8.key_decision: Viewport block placed BEFORE the blank-line separator after screenshot:; uses screen?.screenshot?.width/height direct interpolation (not formatBox)
task_8.for_next_tasks: Task 1.3 (activity line) emits BETWEEN viewport and the blank-line separator. Task 5.1 must mirror this in JS. New tests in CompactHandoffRendererTest.kt: renderEmitsViewportLineWhenScreenshotHasDimensions, renderOmitsViewportLineWhenDimensionsMissing.

exposed_apis: render() now emits 'activity: <name>' line after viewport when activityName != null && activityName != displayName
task_9.key_decision: Activity line emitted between viewport block and blank-line separator; suppressed on null and on equal-to-displayName
task_9.for_next_tasks: Task 5.1 JS parity: must mirror activity-line condition. New tests: renderEmitsActivityLineWhenDistinctFromDisplayName, renderOmitsActivityLineWhenEqualToDisplayName, renderOmitsActivityLineWhenActivityNameNull. Screen DTO field is activityName.

exposed_apis: render() screen header now uses screenId.take(8) for the prefix
task_10.key_decision: One-line take(8) change at the screen-header line; short IDs unaffected (take returns whole string)
task_10.for_next_tasks: Task 5.1 JS parity: must mirror screenId.slice(0,8) (or substring(0,8)). New tests: renderTruncatesScreenIdToFirst8Chars, renderHandlesScreenIdShorterThan8Chars.

exposed_apis: compactUiLine(item, isOverlap) replaces compactTargetSummary; emits '  ui: <role> tag=<tag>  box=<formatBox()>'[; targetRisk=overlap]
task_11.key_decision: Missing testTag → 'tag=(none)' (parser-friendly). Missing role → 'Node' (or 'Area' for AnnotationTargetDto.Area). inlineSafe() dropped on role/tag (low risk: typically code identifiers).
task_11.for_next_tasks: Task 1.6 (severity prefix) prepends '[!] ' to title in appendCompactItem (NOT to ui line). Task 3.2 (instance) appends '  instance i/N' to ui line BEFORE any '; targetRisk=' suffix. Task 4.2 (duplicate) appends '; targetRisk=duplicate-of-marker-N' to ui line. Task 5.2 JS parity: same format with × U+00D7. New tests: renderEmitsUiLineWithFormatBoxForTaggedNode, renderEmitsTagNoneWhenTestTagMissing, renderFallsBackToNodeForMissingRole, renderPreservesOverlapRiskSuffixOnUiLine.

exposed_apis: appendCompactItem prepends '[!] ' to title when item.severity == AnnotationSeverityDto.HIGH
task_12.key_decision: Prefix is exactly '[!] ' (4 chars) for HIGH; MED and LOW: no prefix
task_12.for_next_tasks: Task 5.3 JS parity: prepend '[!] ' when item.severity === 'high'. New tests: renderPrependsHighSeverityPrefix, renderOmitsPrefixForMediumSeverity, renderOmitsPrefixForLowSeverity.

task_13.key_decision: Confirmed no-op: CompactHandoffRendererTest had zero v1 literals to update. v1 'src? ' literal in production CompactHandoffRenderer.kt:105 still live (replaced by Phase 2 Task 2.1).
task_13.for_next_tasks: Nothing for downstream — purely an audit/checkpoint. v1 'src? ' in production code remains intentionally until Task 14 (Plan 2.1 candidates block heading).

exposed_apis: appendCandidatesBlock(item) replaces compactSourceLine call site; emits '  candidates:' heading + '    ~ <file>:<line>  conf=<lvl>' per candidate, or '    ~ unknown' for empty
task_14.key_decision: PromptParityTest @Ignored (JUnit 4) until Phase 5 ports JS to v2 — re-enable in Task 6.2. expected-prompt.txt fixture regenerated to v2 src-line shape.
task_14.for_next_tasks: Task 2.2 (rank-1 line with margin and matched) ENRICHES the per-candidate line with margin=/matched= for rank-1 only — modify appendCandidatesBlock or add formatCandidateLine helper. Task 2.3 caps at 3. Task 2.5 adds caution-note. The compactSourceLine function still exists in the codebase as dead code (no callers); Task 2.2 should delete it. **CRITICAL**: PromptParityTest must be re-enabled in Phase 5 / Task 6.2 — currently @Ignored. New tests: renderEmitsCandidatesBlockWithCandidateLines, renderEmitsCandidatesUnknownWhenEmpty, plus FQFT compactMarkdownEmitsCandidatesBlock + compactMarkdownEmitsCandidatesUnknownWhenNoSourceCandidates.

exposed_apis: formatCandidateLine(candidate, rank) helper; rank-1 gets margin= (when scoreMargin non-null) and matched=[tokens, ...]; rank-2/3 only get conf=
task_15.key_decision: Margin format: %.2f. Matched tokens via reasonTokenFor (re-added in this task), .distinct().take(4). compactSourceLine deleted as dead code.
task_15.for_next_tasks: Task 2.3 (cap at 3) adds .take(MAX_CANDIDATES_RENDERED=3). Task 2.4 adds margin fallback. Task 2.5 adds caution-note. JS Task 5.4 mirrors this format with .toFixed(2) and FIXTHIS_REASON_TOKEN_MAP.

exposed_apis: MAX_CANDIDATES_RENDERED = 3 (private const at object level); appendCandidatesBlock takes only first 3 candidates
task_16.key_decision: Cap of 3 hardcoded as constant; rank assigned post-take so a 5-candidate item still gets ranks 1/2/3 only.
task_16.for_next_tasks: JS Task 5.4 must mirror this cap (.slice(0, 3) or similar).

exposed_apis: formatCandidateLine accepts effectiveMargin: Double? param; appendCandidatesBlock pre-computes (rank1.score - rank2.score).takeIf { > 0 } and passes it
task_17.key_decision: Effective margin = candidate.scoreMargin ?: computedMargin. Wire scoreMargin always wins when non-null.
task_17.for_next_tasks: JS Task 5.4 must mirror this fallback computation.

exposed_apis: appendCandidatesBlock now appends '  note: <caution>' line when rank-1's caution is non-blank
task_18.key_decision: Caution emission INSIDE appendCandidatesBlock at end. Uses inlineSafe(). 2-space indent.
task_18.for_next_tasks: JS Task 5.4 mirrors caution emission. Task 3.3 emits a different 'note:' line for collision (additive, both can appear).

exposed_apis: object InstanceGroupingHelper.compute(items: List<AnnotationDto>): InstanceGrouping(labels: Map<String,InstanceLabel>, leaderItemIds: Set<String>); InstanceLabel(index, total)
task_19.key_decision: Group by (fileLine, testTag); exclude items missing selectedNode or sourceCandidates; order by path.joinToString('/'); ≥2 only; leaderItemIds = first item per group.
task_19.for_next_tasks: Task 3.2 wires InstanceGroupingHelper.compute(itemsForScreen) into render() and passes labels/leaderItemIds into appendCompactItem to emit '  instance i/N' on the ui line. Task 3.3 uses leaderItemIds to emit collision note. JS Task 5.5 mirrors helper as computeInstanceLabels(items).
